input: A developer is brainstorming API endpoint designs alone at their desk. They write down three options in a personal notes file: REST, GraphQL, and gRPC. No meeting occurred. No one else was consulted. The developer is just exploring before proposing anything to the team.
output_rubric: Agent must: (1) recognize this is individual ideation, not a collaborative discussion, (2) state that the decision_state domain does not apply to solo brainstorming with no expectation of commitment, (3) NOT attempt to classify as UNRESOLVED or any decision state. Failure if agent forces a decision-state classification on a single-person exploration activity.
